atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling more vigorous

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports sleeping well

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes half a 5mg finasteride pill daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes 2.5mg of cialis on days he works out

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being out of his cialis supply

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is on his eighth day of a new testosterone injection

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient uses a medication calendar to track his doses

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously used Walmart pharmacy for his prescriptions

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no changes to his pharmacy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Cholesterol and triglycerides have decreased from 265 mg/dL to 145 mg/dL

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Red blood cell count has increased

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: PSA is 0.6, which is below the target of 4.1

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart sounds are normal

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung sounds are clear

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician prescribes continue current testosterone dose at 140 mg

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician orders a repeat PSA test in one year

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician recommends monitoring for potential blood viscosity with higher doses

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician plans schedule follow-up in 3 months to assess response and adjust as needed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs the patient on the importance of medication adherence

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs the patient on potential side effects of testosterone replacement therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician recommends advise the patient to discuss indole-3-carbinol supplementation with his primary care physician
